examples: Liana: I hope you can do the same with the new assignment too.
Liana stood on the doorway silently. She just came round to realise what had happened.
Liana was the main media and connection through which hoolock gibbon traveled between arbor forests and shrubs.
Liana Glavin, secretary of the Adams County Fair Board, has three teenage daughters involved in 4-H.
Artur Liana was last seen on 22 December during a night out in his hometown of Northampton.
